untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit 52-week high price level and 10-day momentum confirmation. The 52-week high is not directly available as an indicator in the allowed list (dc_upper is 20-period Donchian, not 252-period). Momentum over last 10 trading days cannot be precisely expressed without custom lookback indexing or a dedicated momentum indicator. Volume confirmation threshold (30-day average) approximated with vol_ratio_20.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses dc_upper as proxy for recent highs, but this significantly deviates from the intended 52-week high anchoring effect. The signal's core thesis (proximity to 52-week high creating momentum mispricing) cannot be accurately captured without a 252-bar high indicator or explicit historical price level access. Recommend adding hl_52week (52-week high) and momentum_10d to the allowed indicators list, or accept reduced signal fidelity.
